passiveAbilities.name: Sure Footed
passiveAbilities.description: This character may Jog over Water Features and Wooded Patches and pays 1 less energy for Traverse actions.

activeAbilities.name: Brace of Pistols
activeAbilities.description: This character may use the [Reload] ability without paying the energy cost.

activeAbilities.name: Robbery
activeAbilities.description: Target model with less Wds remaining than this character, loses possession of one Moonstone and this character gains possession of that Moonstone.

activeAbilities.name: Reload [Shoot Pistol]
activeAbilities.description: The named ability can be used again. This ability cannot be used while this model is engaged.

arcaneAbilities.name: Shoot Pistol
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target suffers X+1 Impact Dmg.
Catastrophe: This character suffers 3 Wds.

signatureMove.name: Stand & Deliver
signatureMove.endStepEffect: If this character was not slain, and the enemy is in possession of a Moonstone, then they must choose: Suffer 3 Wds or, lose possession of one Moonstone and this character gains possession of that Moonstone.
